creator: ljboiler@gmail.com
text:
eclipse-devel build fails due to hardcoded references to "gcc" on a machine where GCC has been totally removed from base system.

Fix: The attached patch changes the offending hardcoded GCC references to use the port build system CC variable.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to build eclipse-devel port on a 10-CURRENT system where GCC has been totally removed from the base system.
